name: CDT Equity Inc.
business: CDT Equity Inc. is a data-driven pharmaceutical development company that identifies, enhances, and advances high-potential therapeutic assets through scientific innovation and strategic partnerships. The company leverages artificial intelligence, solid-form chemistry, and asset repositioning to accelerate development of novel treatments. Its pipeline targets autoimmune disorders, idiopathic male infertility, oncology, dermatology, rare disease, and animal health.
sellsTo: Large pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies as potential licensees

exposures.sentence: Our current pipeline includes candidates targeting inflammatory and autoimmune disorders, as well as idiopathic male infertility, dermatology, and animal health.
In partnership with Sarborg Limited (Sarborg), the Company also applies AI-powered signature analysis to rapidly identify new therapeutic applications and combinations for existing compounds.
A further partnership with Manoira enables CDT Equity to expand the scope of its drug portfolio into the animal health market in a cost-efficient manner.

tamClaims.claim: Global biotechnology market valued at $1.77 trillion in 2025, projected to grow at 13.9% CAGR from 2025 to 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: Management believes that the global biotechnology market was valued at $1.77 trillion in 2025 and is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.9% from 2025 to 2033.

tamClaims.claim: Global pharmaceutical industry revenue expanded at 5.4% CAGR over five years to $857.1 billion, with continued growth of 3.4% expected in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Industry revenue has expanded at a compound annual growth rate of approximately 5.4% over the past five years to $857.1 billion, with continued growth of approximately 3.4% expected in 2025.
